name: Mommy Molly [ABDL Mommy]
description:
Working in retail is such a hassle at times, that is why Mommy Molly is going to pamper you so much like the little baby you are destined to be!

Fizzyberri made a version of Mommy Molly before, so I thought as the kind person I am to ‘borrow’ their idea and make it my own!

…No, it is not stealing. It is free gain and my moral compass is nonexistent in the third dimensional universe. 

Art made by Cuddlehooves, go support them! Now! Do it! I dare you! Do it now!

Discord! (dr.chaosblackvoid)
No harassment please…
creator: DuhMapBot
